summary: Completed comprehensive testing of S Chand AI Infrastructure website. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% pass rate) and frontend functionality fully operational including navigation, forms, admin panel, and lead capture systems.
passed_tests: Backend API health check and connectivity
Admin authentication (correct and incorrect credentials)
Stats endpoint returning proper data
Lead creation, retrieval, and deletion
File upload, download, and deletion
File categorization and filtering
Homepage loads with all key sections (hero, stats, categories, pipeline, benchmarks)
Navigation to all pages (Datasets, Solutions, Industries, Resources, Contact)
Dataset catalog search and filtering functionality
Dataset detail pages with use cases and structure tables
Contact form submission with validation and API integration
Lead capture dialog functionality from all trigger buttons
Lead capture form submission and processing
Admin panel login with correct credentials (admin/schand2024)
Admin dashboard with stats display
Admin panel file and leads tab switching
Admin file upload dialog functionality
All CTA buttons opening appropriate dialogs
Dataset category cards navigation
Dark theme styling and responsive design
Dropdown selections in all forms
Form validation and error handling
